code:
sequenceDiagram
    autonumber
    participant Prov as Provider System
    participant Intake as Intake Service
    participant Rules as Rule Engine
    participant RAG as RAG Service
    participant CLF as Predictive Model
    participant Fuse as Fusion
    participant Expl as Explanation Builder
    participant Rev as Reviewer App
    participant Ledger as Decision Ledger

    Prov->>Intake: Submit PA + clinical docs
    Intake->>Rules: Evaluate policy criteria(HealthTech_LabAnalyzer)
    Intake->>RAG: Retrieve policy snippets + draft necessity
    Intake->>CLF: Predict approval probability
    Rules-->>Fuse: rule hits/misses
    RAG-->>Fuse: grounded rationale w/ citations
    CLF-->>Fuse: score + top factors
    Fuse-->Expl: composite decision context
    Expl-->>Rev: Explanation Packet + checklist
    Rev->>Ledger: Store packet (HealthTech_EMR_Sync)

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个完整的PA（Prior Authorization）审批流程，从Provider System提交申请开始，经过Intake Service，然后同时走三条并行路径：规则引擎判断、RAG检索政策依据、还有预测模型打分。最后这三路结果要融合，生成解释说明给审核员，最终归档到Decision Ledger。
明白了，是一个多源决策融合架构。我想确认一下：Rule Engine评估的时候，需要特别标注是针对HealthTech_LabAnalyzer的政策标准吗？还有最后归档到Ledger的时候，是否要注明同步到HealthTech_EMR_Sync？
对，两个标注都要。Rule Engine那步要带上HealthTech_LabAnalyzer，Ledger归档要触发HealthTech_EMR_Sync同步。另外RAG那步不只是检索，还要生成draft necessity，预测模型要输出approval probability和top factors。
好的，我现在把主流程画出来：Prov到Intake提交PA和临床文档，然后Intake分发给Rules、RAG、CLF三个并行处理。Rules返回rule hits/misses给Fusion，RAG返回带引用的grounded rationale，CLF返回score和top factors。
等等，Fusion到Explanation Builder的箭头方向确认一下——应该是Fusion把composite decision context推给Expl，然后Expl生成Explanation Packet给Reviewer App，对吧？
确认，Fusion→Expl是composite decision context，Expl→Rev是Explanation Packet加上checklist。然后Rev审核完存储到Ledger，触发HealthTech_EMR_Sync。
刚才我漏了一个细节：Intake到Rules的那条消息，需要明确写成Evaluate policy criteria(HealthTech_LabAnalyzer)，括号里的标注不能省略。还有Ledger那步要写成Store packet (HealthTech_EMR_Sync)。

已修正，现在完整流程是：Prov-Intake提交PA和临床文档，Intake-Rules评估HealthTech_LabAnalyzer标准，Intake-RAG检索政策片段并生成必要性草稿，Intake-CLF预测审批概率，三路结果汇入Fusion，再经Explanation Builder生成带checklist的解释包给Reviewer App，最后Rev-Ledger存储并同步HealthTech_EMR_Sync。
